seg-0091.originalTarget: This is an intentionally very long text segment used to demonstrate exactly how the layout reacts when a segment wraps across multiple lines. It is absolutely crucial to ensure that the line height, the internal padding, and the vertical alignment of the scores within the grid remain completely intact, even when the translated content reaches five lines or more. This helps designers and developers to accurately evaluate this specific edge case in the user interface. We add a little more text to ensure it spans.
